label: Structural (conf-tuned)
_note: PROVISIONAL — keeps Elo at full weight (50/50 Futi/Elo), nudges under-connected confederations up and the over-connected one down, per the struct_variants bake-off (champion among defensible variants, RPS -6.8% on the n=23 MD1 slice). Magnitude is NOT trustworthy yet (MD1-only, monotonic-to-100/0 Futi curve = overfit signature). Retune after MD2.

label: 100% Futi (no Elo)
_note: Futi-only — hits RPS 0.1916 (13/23) on the MD1 slice. Frozen June-11 ratings. Shown for direct comparison only.

label: Structural (post-MD1)
_note: Same 50/50 Elo/Futi structural model, but using ratings updated through MD1 results (Elo from eloratings.net 2026-06-17, Futi from app 2026-06-18). No weight changes — only the input data is fresher.

label: 100% Futi (post-MD1)
_note: Futi-only model using ratings updated through MD1 results (same source files as Structural post-MD1). Elo completely dropped.
